transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, First National, how can I help?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: My daughter is waiting for a transfer I made yesterday morning. Two hundred and fifty pounds. She hasn't received it.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me look... I can see the payment. It shows it was sent.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: She definitely hasn't received it though. Her account is empty.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It might still be processing. Sometimes it takes twenty-four to forty-eight hours.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: It's been over twenty-four hours already.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Right. Well I can submit a trace request. It might take a few days to come back.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: A few days? She needs that money for food shopping.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand. I'll put in the request. There's a reference I'll note on your account.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: What's the reference number so I can tell my daughter?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I don't have a number to give you yet. The request needs to be processed first. Just wait for now.

planted_violations: did not definitively raise a trace or provide any reference number
left customer with vague 'few days' timeline and no actionable next step
